deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land development opportunity. Isaac Linares showed interest in mobile home project. Deal terminated May 29 2026. Signs picked up, listing canceled.

logs.m: Listing canceled. Signs picked up. Walking away from deal.
Isaac proposed development concept: mobile homes, half for veterans
Showing conducted. Sisters excited about Isaac opportunity.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: VA loan, 3BR/2BA, 2972 sqft. Underwater ~$93K-$143K. Mutual termination May 29 2026. Moving back in, plan to relist after updates.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Clients moving back in. Plan to relist later.
Call with Matt and Chandler. Presented three paths forward. Chandler laid off (hardship doc). Leaning short sale.
Where Things Stand email sent. Market analysis, three options, payoff confirmed $489.5K.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, 1886 sqft, 2011 build. Listed May 14 at $259900. Multiple showings. Second-look buyers are hottest lead. June deadline for NC relocation.
deals.next: Confirm showing May 30, follow up with second-look buyers

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back, property is their favorite. Pre-inspection offered.
Investor cash offer at $176300 discussed with Jose and Katy
MLS live. First showing 9:15am. Canvassed neighborhood, distributed flyers.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 1809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff ~$257K. Market range $295K recommended. Divorce situation, motivated sellers.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter, schedule photos, sign listing agreement

logs.m: Met at property. CMA pulled, net sheet built, payoff confirmed $255578.
Prior clients, VA renovation loan. Going through divorce, need to sell after renovation.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751

Cleanup active. Floor demo complete. Drywall cut for electrical and plumbing.
Work officially starting with Matt Toney contractor, dumpsters dropped.

logs.m: Under contract Espinoza, $113K. TXR 1903 sent to Javier. EMD not yet received.
Clearing complete, photos posted. First offer stalled, no EMD received.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd

Fernando Castillo signed lien release. Delivered to Chicago Title.
Contacted lien holder Fabian Cerrillo. Willing to work with us.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: Lennar home Grace Gardens. Rental listing arrangement. Jimbo backed out May 28. Chris sent $500. Ended on good terms.

logs.m: Release signed with Jimbo. Payment received. Closed out clean.
Jimbo backed out of rental arrangement. Chris sent $500 compensation.

deals.title: Milagros Stringer Buyer

logs.m: 301 W Saxet wholesale deal from Isaac at $85K. Connected Mike and Alice with Isaac. Zach sent property info.
Laid off context (Chandler). Hardship documentation on file if needed.
Following up on buyer status and MI Homes option from Frank.
